计算机断层扫描

ct.d:
n a New England state; one of the original 13 colonies
n a method of examining body organs by scanning them with X rays and using a computer to construct a series of cross-sectional scans along a single axis

ctab.t: [医] 溴化十六烷基三甲铵

ctau.t: abbr. Catholic Total Abstinence Union 天主教绝对禁酒联合会

ctb.t: abbr. cement-treated base 水泥底座; ceramic-tile base 陶瓷底座

ctbs.t: abbr. Comprehensive Tests of Basic Skills 基本技能综合测试

ctbt.t: abbr. ceftibuten 头孢布坦（抗生素）; Comprehensive Test Ban Treaty 全面禁止核试验条约

ctc.t: abbr. 四氧化碳（全称Carbon Tetrachloride）
ctc.d: n an agency that helps the Director of Central Intelligence coordinate counterterrorist efforts in order to preempt and disrupt and defeat terrorist activities at the earliest possible stage

ctcl.t: [医][=cutaneous T cell lymphoma]皮肤T细胞淋巴瘤

ctcs.t: (ctc 的复数) abbr. 四氧化碳（全称Carbon Tetrachloride）

plural of ctc
n an agency that helps the Director of Central Intelligence coordinate counterterrorist efforts in order to preempt and disrupt and defeat terrorist activities at the earliest possible stage

ctds.t: [计]= Code Translation Data System,代码翻译数据系统

cte.t: [医][=calf thymus extract]小牛胸腺抽提物

ctene.d: n. a locomotor organ consisting of a row of strong cilia whose bases are fused

ctenidium.d: n comb-like respiratory structure serving as the gill of certain mollusks

ctenocephalides.d: n an arthropod genus of fleas

ctenocephalus.d: n a former usage synonymous with Ctenocephalides

ctenocyst.d: n. An organ of the Ctenophora, supposed to be sensory.

ctenoid.t: a. 栉状的, 有栉齿状边缘的, 栉齿鳞科的
ctenoid.d: a. resembling a comb; having projections like the teeth of a comb

ctenophora.d:
n. pl. A class of Coelenterata, commonly ellipsoidal in
   shape, swimming by means of eight longitudinal rows of paddles. The
   separate paddles somewhat resemble combs.

ctenophore.d: n biradially symmetrical hermaphroditic solitary marine animals resembling jellyfishes having for locomotion eight rows of cilia arranged like teeth in a comb

ctenophores.t: (ctenophore 的第三人称 -s形式) n.栉水母
ctenophores.d:
-s form of ctenophore
n biradially symmetrical hermaphroditic solitary marine animals resembling jellyfishes having for locomotion eight rows of cilia arranged like teeth in a comb

ctenostomata.d:
n. pl. A suborder of Bryozoa, usually having a circle of
   bristles below the tentacles.

ctes.t: [计]= Computer Telex Exchange System,计算机用户电报交换系统

ctetosome.t: [医] 超数染色体; 异染色体, 性染色体

ctf.t: abbr. certify 证明; certified 有证明的; certificate 证书; combined task force 联合特遣部队
